text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Japanese Derby drawing near, a press
conference is held at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's here that Special Week vows to win and keep
her promise to her moms...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As well as to give me the title of Derby trainer.
